$comment: Lake package roster for the lake-cache-refresh workflow. CONTENT CONFIG, not platform: a downstream repo edits this list to match its own Lean packages. Each entry is one orphan-branch cache family. 'mathlib' (lake-root '.') warms the workspace-root Mathlib oleans and is the conventional first entry. The workflow (.github/workflows/lake-cache-refresh.yml) reads this file to build its matrix — it hardcodes no package names.
